operator: a NOT BETWEEN b AND c
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value Float32, str_value String, nullable_value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 1.1, 'apple', NULL), (2, NULL, 'banana', 2), (3, -1.1, 'carrot', 3), (4, 3.4, NULL, 4), (5, -2.2, 'date', NULL);
SELECT arraySort((x) -> CAST(x AS Nullable(Int32)), arraySort([value]), [str_value]) AS sorted_values FROM test_data WHERE value NOT BETWEEN -2 AND 2;
SELECT id, arraySort((x, y) -> y, [str_value], [value]) AS sorted_strings FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING arraySort([value]) NOT BETWEEN 0 AND 3;
WITH (SELECT arraySort([1, 2, 3]), arraySort([4, 5, 6])) AS sorted_arrays SELECT arraySort((x) -> x, sorted_arrays[1], [5, 3, 1]) AS final_sorted_array;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (num Nullable(Int32), text String) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO temp_data VALUES (NULL, 'miss'), (1, 'hit'), (2, 'hit hit');
SELECT arraySort((x, y) -> y, (SELECT text FROM temp_data WHERE num NOT BETWEEN 0 AND 2), [num]) AS conditional_sort FROM temp_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE value NOT BETWEEN -inf AND inf;

SELECT arraySort((x, y) -> x, [str_value], arraySort(arrayMap(x -> COALESCE(nullable_value, 0), (SELECT nullable_value FROM test_data))) ) AS complex_sort FROM test_data WHERE str_value NOT BETWEEN '' AND 'z';
SELECT value, arraySort([CAST(value AS UInt32), IF(value IS NULL, 0, value)]) AS sorted_numeric FROM test_data HAVING sorted_numeric NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 5;
